message:
🌱 Add cert-manager: Support ACME certificate profile selection (e.g. tlsserver, mission (#1305)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-7695-support-acme-certificate-profile-selection-e-g-tlsserver-short",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Support ACME certificate profile selection (e.g. tlsserver, shortlived)",
+    "description": "Support ACME certificate profile selection (e.g. tlsserver, shortlived). Requested by 18+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cert-manager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cert-manager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cert-manager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nLet's Encrypt is extending the ACME protocol to include \"certificate profiles\": https://letsencrypt.org/2025/01/09/acme-profiles/\n\nBy selecting a certificate profile, certificates with different traits can be generated by the CA."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support ACME certificate profile selection (e.g. tlsserver,…",
+        "description": "📢 A new pre-release is available which contains this fix or feature: \n * https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/releases/tag/v1.18.0-beta.0. \n \nPlease test and report back.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support ACME certificate profile selection (e.g. tlsserver,…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "📢 A new pre-release is available which contains this fix or feature: \n * https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/releases/tag/v1.18.0-beta.0. \n \nPlease test and report back.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
